creator: wkb@chello.nl
text:
Are you sure you used the right image for the boot floppy? There is a
2.something megabyte file as well that is intended for LS120 (?) 
disks.

IIRC I once had a similar (the same?) error when I 'dd'ed the wrong
image file from the CD onto the floppy.
